question: What can we conclude about the latest year's recruitment performance from this chart?

options.A: The latest year has already recorded more new employees than any previous year.
options.B: The latest year clearly shows a sharp drop in total new employees compared to previous years.
options.C: The latest year has exactly the same total number of new employees as the average of all previous years.
options.D: We cannot determine whether the latest year will end higher or lower than previous years because it only shows data up to May 01, 2024.

explanation: The area and line for the latest year include only about 4 months of data, while earlier years show totals for the full year. Visually, the latest year appears much lower, but this is purely because the period is shorter, not because the underlying performance has collapsed. Without the remaining months, we cannot judge the full-year outcome.
